title: Sphere's Redstone Clock [Forge]
description: Adds a simple Redstone Clocks system
body:
![[https://modrinth.com/mod/spheres-redstone-clock](https://modrinth.com/mod/spheres-redstone-clock)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d9827a6c0337017d8eb5e5b8ce94a9e6bd8be83.png)
![[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spheres-redstone-clock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spheres-redstone-clock)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d92fa09732a0322defde2ecaaa88d0a47fe8891.png)
## 🕚 Sphere's Redstone Clock ## 
A server-side mod that adds a **Redstone Clock system** to your server.
You can **enable/disable clocks** using the **Clock Activator**!

![Redstone Clocks and recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55abc6ce2dfc26bfcadec43ea546d56f22c66643.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EGXnkzce-W4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
